'''Petja''' was a [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] companion star to the primary star [[Hoth's Brand]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Hoth's Brand system]]. It was set in the eleventh orbit around Hoth's Brand, just beyond the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Othone]].

It was named for the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Petja]], who fought in the [[Ruusan campaign]] a [[1000 BBY/Legends|thousand years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

{{Star-stub}}
